app.name: WenZi
app.hotkey_dialog.title: Hotkey: {key}
app.hotkey_dialog.record_message: Press any key to register it as a hotkey...
app.hotkey_dialog.combo_instructions: Enter = confirm | ESC = cancel | Delete = reset
app.config_error.title: Configuration Error
app.model_error.title: Model Load Failed
notification.model.switched.subtitle: Now using: {name}
notification.model.cannot_switch.subtitl: Please wait for current operation to finish.
alert.model.switch_failed.title: Model Switch Failed
alert.provider.add_asr.title: Add ASR Provider
alert.provider.add_asr.message:
name       — unique provider name
base_url   — OpenAI-compatible ASR endpoint
api_key    — authentication key
models     — one model per line (indented)
alert.provider.add_llm.title: Add AI Provider
alert.provider.add_llm.message:
name       — unique provider name
base_url   — OpenAI-compatible API endpoint
api_key    — authentication key
models     — one model per line (indented)
extra_body — optional, extra JSON for request body
alert.provider.verify_passed.title: Verification Passed
alert.provider.verify_failed.title: Verification Failed
alert.provider.remove_asr.title: Remove ASR Provider
alert.provider.remove_asr.message: Remove ASR provider '{name}' and all its models?
alert.provider.remove_llm.title: Remove Provider
alert.provider.remove_llm.message: Remove provider '{name}' and all its models?
alert.provider.init_failed: Failed to initialize provider. Check that the openai package is installed.
alert.enhance_mode.add.title: Add Enhancement Mode
alert.enhance_mode.add.message:
Edit the template below, then click Save.

  label  — display name in menu
  order  — sort weight (smaller = higher)
  body   — system prompt for the LLM
alert.enhance_mode.id.title: Mode ID
alert.enhance_mode.id.message:
Enter a short ID for this mode (used as filename).
Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
alert.enhance_mode.invalid_id.title: Invalid ID
alert.enhance_mode.invalid_id.message: Mode ID must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
alert.enhance_mode.already_exists.title: Already Exists
alert.enhance_mode.already_exists.messag:
A mode file '{id}.md' already exists.
Edit it directly or choose a different ID.
alert.enhance_mode.invalid_content.title: Invalid Content
alert.enhance_mode.invalid_content.messa: The mode file has no prompt content.
alert.enhance_mode.added.title: Mode Added
alert.vocab.auto_building: Vocabulary is being auto-built. Please wait.
notification.config.reloaded.subtitle: Configuration has been reloaded.
alert.about.title: WenZi
alert.update.title: Update to {version}?
alert.update.message: The update will be downloaded and installed automatically. WenZi will restart after installation.
alert.update.cannot_message:
{app}.app is in a read-only location ({path}).

Please download the update manually from the browser.
alert.update.failed.title: Update Failed
alert.update.failed.message:
{error}

Would you like to download the update manually?
alert.update.restart_message: WenZi will quit and relaunch with the new version.
alert.update.swap_failed_message: Could not apply the update. Please download and install manually.
alert.update.staged_message: A previously downloaded update is ready to install. WenZi will restart with the new version.
alert.transcription.failed.title: Transcription Failed
alert.transcription.failed.message:
Error: {error}

Please check the log or try switching to a different model.
alert.settings.cannot_switch.message: Please wait for current operation to finish.
alert.settings.restart_required.title: Restart Required
alert.settings.icon_cache_cleared.title: Icon Cache Cleared
alert.settings.icon_cache_cleared.messag: App and browser icon caches have been cleared. Icons will be re-extracted on next search.
alert.clipboard.not_supported.title: Clipboard Content Not Supported
alert.clipboard.not_supported.message: The clipboard does not contain text. Please copy some text first.
alert.clipboard.empty.title: Clipboard Empty
alert.clipboard.too_long.title: Text Too Long
alert.clipboard.too_long.message:
The clipboard contains {length} characters (limit: {limit}).

Please copy a shorter text and try again.
